name: Stoicism
tagline: Virtue is the only good. Master your mind, not the world.
summary: A practical philosophy of resilience, virtue, and rational acceptance. The Stoics taught that we suffer not from events but from our judgments about them, and that a good life is built from disciplined character, not from controlling outcomes.

quotes.text: You have power over your mind — not outside events.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.text: We suffer more in imagination than in reality.
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.text: It is not what happens, but how you react that matters.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.text: Waste no more time arguing what a good man should be. Be one.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius
